name: clarification
description: Ask the user for more information when the request is ambiguous or needs more detail.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: The question to ask the user.

parameters.name: expected_input_type
parameters.description: Input type hint for the UI. Use 'path' for filesystem paths (enables autocomplete), or 'free_text' (default) for plain text.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: For path inputs: the base directory prefix. The user types relative to this prefix. Example: '/data/users/zgchen/fbsource260306/fbcode'.

usage_guidance: Use when the user's request is ambiguous or needs more detail. For path inputs, set expected_input_type to 'path' and prefix to the base directory.
